3120480.name: МЕМОЛОГИЯ: ЕГЭ ПО СТРИМЕРАМ
3120480.description:
Memology: Exam on Streamers is an unexpected (almost) addition to the main game, in which you will test your memological knowledge in the field of streaming!

  • How many popular (or randomly selected by the developer) streamers do you know?
  • Are you ready to show off your extensive knowledge of the CIS streamers community?
  • Are you generally ready to conquer another chapter of Memology for yourself?

don't wait and find out right now!

The main part of the challenging gameplay of the game will be that you will have to click on the correct answers to memological-streamer questions. Try to cope with this challenge and become a professor of Memological Additions!

  • More than 25 new questions about all your favorite (and not so favorite) streamers;
  • Thematic soundtrack;
  • Perfect graphics and design;

P.S. We express our deep gratitude to all streamers who promote meme education to the masses, thank you!
